title: Immediate Requirement Logistics Manager at Dedicated Freight Corridor

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Logistics Manager at Dedicated Freight Corridor
jsonLd.description:
Join the Dedicated Freight Corridor family as a Logistics Manager in Noida. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Dedicated Freight Corridor:
Dedicated Freight Corridor is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Route Optimization
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in Fleet Management
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in Reverse Logistics

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Noida, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Dedicated Freight Corridor!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
